{ "name": "pestphp/pest-plugin-arch", "description": "The Arch plugin for Pest PHP.", "keywords": [ "php", "framework", "pest", "unit", "test", "testing", "plugin", "arch", "architecture" ], "license": "MIT", "require": { "php": "^8.3", "pestphp/pest-plugin": "^4.0.0", "ta-tikoma/phpunit-architecture-test": "^0.8.5" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Pest\\Arch\\": "src/" }, "files": [ "src/Autoload.php" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Tests\\": "tests/" }, "files": [ "tests/Fixtures/Functions.php", "tests/Fixtures/NamespacedFunctions.php" ] }, "require-dev": { "pestphp/pest": "^4.0.0", "pestphp/pest-dev-tools": "^4.0.0" }, "minimum-stability": "dev", "prefer-stable": true, "config": { "sort-packages": true, "preferred-install": "dist", "allow-plugins": { "pestphp/pest-plugin": true } }, "scripts": { "refacto": "rector", "lint": "pint", "test:refacto": "rector --dry-run", "test:lint": "pint --test", "test:types": "phpstan analyse --ansi", "test:unit": "pest", "test:unit-parallel": "pest --parallel", "test": [ "@test:refacto", "@test:lint", "@test:types", "@test:unit", "@test:unit-parallel" ] }, "extra": { "pest": { "plugins": [ "Pest\\Arch\\Plugin" ] } } }
